title: taraxacum acrophorum
intro: Taraxacum acrophorum, also known as the Himalayan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum acrophorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
